title: Senior Fleet Manager at Omni Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Omni Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Omni Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Omni Logistics India:
Omni Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Omni Logistics India!
